Meta.Author: Safeguard Custom Platform Toolkit
Meta.Description: Database platform with SQL-based password management via REST API proxy

Do.Comment: NOTE: Safeguard custom platform scripts use HTTP/SSH commands.
For direct database access, use SSH to connect to a jump host
and run SQL commands, or use a REST API proxy for the database.
This template shows an SSH-to-database pattern.
Adjust the connection method and SQL syntax for your database.

Throw.Value: CheckSystem not implemented - choose SSH or HTTP transport and adjust

Do.Comment: Attempt to authenticate to the database as the target user
Option 1: Via SSH to a host with database CLI tools
Option 2: Via HTTP REST API proxy

Throw.Value: CheckPassword not implemented - adjust for your database type

Do.Comment: SQL Server example: ALTER LOGIN [username] WITH PASSWORD = N'newpass'
PostgreSQL example: ALTER USER username WITH PASSWORD 'newpass'
MySQL example: ALTER USER 'username'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY 'newpass'
Connect via SSH to a host with CLI tools, then run the SQL command

Throw.Value: ChangePassword not implemented - adjust for your database type

Do.Comment: SQL Server: SELECT name FROM sys.sql_logins WHERE is_disabled = 0

Throw.Value: DiscoverAccounts not implemented - adjust for your database type
